title: Richly Roasted Northern Irish Beef Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful keto-friendly dish featuring tender beef, rich sauce, and a crispy en-croute topping, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large skillet, cook the beef cubes over medium-high heat until browned on all sides
Add the chopped onion and sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender
In a small bowl, mix together the cumin seeds and almond flour
Add the beef broth to the skillet and stir to combine with the beef and vegetables
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and melted butter
Add the shredded cheddar cheese to the egg mixture and stir to combine
Pour the egg mixture over the beef mixture in the baking dish
Sprinkle the cumin seed and almond flour mixture evenly over the top of the casserole
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the en-croute topping is golden brown
